question: Count the number of customers located in the USA.
nl_response: There are 13 customers located in the USA.
sql_generated: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'USA';

question: Find all invoices for the customer with ID 1.
nl_response: The customer with ID 1 has 7 invoices.

question: List each album title along with the artist's name.
nl_response: There are 100 albums listed, each with its corresponding artist's name.
sql_generated: SELECT T1.Title, T2.Name FROM Album AS T1 INNER JOIN Artist AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId = T2.ArtistId

question: How many tracks belong to the 'Rock' genre?
nl_response: There are 1297 tracks that belong to the 'Rock' genre.
sql_generated: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Rock'

question: Find the total number of items sold for each media type.
sql_generated: SELECT T1.Name, COUNT(T2.MediaTypeId) AS TotalItemsSold FROM MediaType AS T1 INNER JOIN Invoices AS T2 ON T1.MediaTypeId = T2.MediaTypeId GROUP BY T1.Name

question: List the first and last names of all employees who are Sales Support Agents.
nl_response: The first and last names of all Sales Support Agents are Jane Peacock, Margaret Park, and Steve Johnson.
sql_generated: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Employee WHERE Title = 'Sales Support Agent'

question: List the top 5 customers who have spent the most money in total.
nl_response: The top 5 customers who have spent the most money in total are Helena Holý, Richard Cunningham, Luis Rojas, Ladislav Kovács, and Hugh O'Reilly, each with a total expenditure of $49.62.
sql_generated:
SELECT c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName, SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSpent
FROM Customer c
JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
GROUP BY c.CustomerId
ORDER BY TotalSpent DESC
LIMIT 5

question: Which artist has the most tracks in the database? Give the name and count.
nl_response: Iron Maiden has the most tracks with 213.
sql_generated: SELECT T3.Name, COUNT(*) as TrackCount FROM Track AS T1 INNER JOIN Album AS T2 ON T1.AlbumId = T2.AlbumId INNER JOIN Artist AS T3 ON T2.ArtistId = T3.ArtistId GROUP BY T3.Name ORDER BY TrackCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which genres have more than 100 tracks? List the genre name and count.
nl_response: Genres with more than 100 tracks include Rock (1297), Metal (374), Latin (579), Jazz (130), and Alternative & Punk (332).
sql_generated: SELECT T2.Name, COUNT(T1.TrackId) AS TrackCount FROM TRACK AS T1 INNER JOIN GENRE AS T2 ON T1.GenreId = T2.GenreId GROUP BY T2.Name HAVING COUNT(T1.TrackId) > 100

question: Calculate the average track length in seconds for each genre.
nl_response: The average track length in seconds for each genre ranges from 134.17 seconds (genre 5) to 2934.05 seconds (genre 24).
sql_generated: SELECT AVG(Milliseconds / 1000) AS AverageLengthInSeconds, GenreId FROM Track GROUP BY GenreId

question: Identify the artist who has earned the most revenue from customers in Canada.
sql_generated: SELECT T1.Name FROM ARTIST AS T1 JOIN ALBUM AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId = T2.ArtistId JOIN TRACK AS T3 ON T2.AlbumId = T3.AlbumId JOIN INVOICEITEM AS T4 ON T3.TrackId = T4.TrackId JOIN CUSTOMER AS T5 ON T4.InvoiceId = T5.InvoiceId WHERE T5.Country = 'Canada' GROUP BY T1.Name ORDER BY SUM(T4.UnitPrice * T4.Quantity) DESC LIMIT 1
